notes: Upload only into these app-owned paths. distTarget and deployConfigTarget must be child directories under projectRoot. dataTarget and mediaTarget must stay outside app files and separate from each other. Do not upload to the server homepage root such as /var/www/html, /usr/share/nginx/html, /www/wwwroot, or /home/*/public_html. Do not use a user home root such as /home/wang as projectRoot; create an app-owned child directory instead.
